title: Air defense active
description: American Senator Graham admired the Ukrainian "pisyun". He visited the production of Ukrainian SkyFall drones, where he was shown Vampire bombers, Shrike FPV drones and "Shakhedov" P1-SUN interceptors. The senator called the enterprise ultra-modern and stated that it would be a "huge mistake" for the US not to cooperate with Ukraine in the field of drones. According to him, Ukrainian technologies are already ahead of development...
description_en: American Senator Graham admired the Ukrainian "pisyun". He visited the production of Ukrainian SkyFall drones, where he was shown Vampire bombers, Shrike FPV drones and "Shakhedov" P1-SUN interceptors. The senator called the enterprise ultra-modern and stated that it would be a "huge mistake" for the US not to cooperate with Ukraine in the field of drones. According to him, Ukrainian technologies are already ahead of development...
description_uk: Американский сенатор Грэм восхитился украинским "писюном" Он посетил производство украинских дронов SkyFall, где ему показали бомберы Vampire, FPV-дроны Shrike и перехватчики "Шахедов" P1-SUN. Сенатор назвал предприятие сверхсовременным и заявил, что для США было бы "огромной ошибкой" не сотрудничать с Украиной в сфере беспилотников. По его словам, украинские технологии уже опережают разработки...

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Ukraine says it struck 21 Russian tankers as Moscow reportedly halts shipping through key canal. According to Brovdi, Ukrainian drones hit 21 tankers, four tugboats, two dry cargo vessels, and one specialized vessel, recording 73 successful strikes during the overnight operation.
description_en: Ukraine says it struck 21 Russian tankers as Moscow reportedly halts shipping through key canal. According to Brovdi, Ukrainian drones hit 21 tankers, four tugboats, two dry cargo vessels, and one specialized vessel, recording 73 successful strikes during the overnight operation.
description_uk: Ukraine says it struck 21 Russian tankers as Moscow reportedly halts shipping through key canal. According to Brovdi, Ukrainian drones hit 21 tankers, four tugboats, two dry cargo vessels, and one specialized vessel, recording 73 successful strikes during the overnight operation.

description: The characteristics of the new Russian Geran-4 Syker drone, which is a modernization of the Shaheda, have appeared. The Russians claim that the flight range of the new drone is 550 km, and the weight of the warhead reaches 50 kg. Thanks to the turbojet power plant, the device has a higher speed compared to drones of the same class, which is 300 km/h. Главная...
description_en: The characteristics of the new Russian Geran-4 Syker drone, which is a modernization of the Shaheda, have appeared. The Russians claim that the flight range of the new drone is 550 km, and the weight of the warhead reaches 50 kg. Thanks to the turbojet power plant, the device has a higher speed compared to drones of the same class, which is 300 km/h. Главная...
description_uk: Появились характеристики нового руснявого дрона "Герань-4 Сикер", который является модернизацией "Шахеда" Россияне заявляют, что дальность полета нового дрона составляет 550 км, а масса боевой части достигает 50 кг. Благодаря турбореактивной силовой установке аппарат отличается более высокой по сравнению с беспилотниками аналогичного класса скоростью, которая составляет 300 км/ч. Главная...

title: Donetsk: 69 missiles intercepted

title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Update: The number of people injured in Russia’s ballistic missile attack on Kyiv has risen to 11. President Volodymyr Zelensky noted that air defenses were unable to stop the ballistic missiles: “Most of the targets were shot down by our defenders, but not the ballistic missiles.” He urged partners to quickly deliver on promised air defense packages, Patriot licenses, and the joint European...

title: Chernihiv: Shelling near civilians
description: Eleven people were injured in Kyiv during a nighttime Russian attack, including a child. Even before the announcement of the air alert, there were hits on civilian infrastructure. Operational services are working on the ground: residential buildings, offices, theological seminary were damaged in the capital. The liquidation of the consequences of shelling continues in Odesa, Sumy, Kharkiv and Chernihiv regions. Russia used...
description_en: Eleven people were injured in Kyiv during a nighttime Russian attack, including a child. Even before the announcement of the air alert, there were hits on civilian infrastructure. Operational services are working on the ground: residential buildings, offices, theological seminary were damaged in the capital. The liquidation of the consequences of shelling continues in Odesa, Sumy, Kharkiv and Chernihiv regions. Russia used...
description_uk: Одинадцять людей поранено у Києві під час нічної російської атаки, серед них дитина. Ще до оголошення повітряної тривоги були влучання по цивільній інфраструктурі. На місцях працюють оперативні служби: житлові будинки, офіси, богословська семінарія були пошкоджені у столиці. Триває ліквідація наслідків обстрілу і в Одеській, Сумській, Харківській та Чернігівській областях. Росія застосувала...

title: Casualties reported
description: 🤖 NRK performed more than 16,600 missions at the front in a month 👥 Units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine performed more than 16,600 logistical and evacuation missions with the help of ground robotic complexes in June. Ground drones continue to replace the military in the most difficult areas of the front: delivering ammunition and food, as well as evacuating the wounded and dead. 🗒 Dynamics of missions by month: 🟡January – 7...
description_en: 🤖 NRK performed more than 16,600 missions at the front in a month 👥 Units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine performed more than 16,600 logistical and evacuation missions with the help of ground robotic complexes in June. Ground drones continue to replace the military in the most difficult areas of the front: delivering ammunition and food, as well as evacuating the wounded and dead. 🗒 Dynamics of missions by month: 🟡January – 7...
description_uk: 🤖 НРК виконали понад 16 600 місій на фронті за місяць 👥 Підрозділи Сил оборони України у червні виконали за допомогою наземних роботизованих комплексів понад 16 600 логістичних та евакуаційних місій. Наземні дрони продовжують заміняти військових на найскладніших ділянках фронту: доставляють боєприпаси й харчування, а також евакуюють поранених та полеглих. 🗒 Динаміка місій по місяцях: 🟡січень – 7...
